objective: Complete F-0098 by making mock_exam consume the immutable paper_section and question_group hierarchy as grouped navigation pages: render shared group material once, render every ordered child question within the authoritative group, preserve per-question answer identity/autosave/revision/retry semantics, and keep standalone and legacy snapshots compatible. Run the final static acceptance matrix for the already-closed snapshot, practice and report partitions; do not change snapshot production, scoring, persistence, permissions or organization training.

permission, entitlement, role or learner visibility changes

authoritativeChainEvidence.requirement: Module 02 section 3.7 and D14 require skill flows to preserve paper_section and question_group, share one material container, keep child scoring independent and expose group navigation.
authoritativeChainEvidence.producer: Foundation commit 885558610 emits a versioned nested snapshot and the shared reader preserves ordered section, group and child public identity; report commit 960c88b9e consumes the same immutable identity.
authoritativeChainEvidence.consumer: StudentMockExamPage extracts the group fields but flattens them back into one-question pages, repeats shared material and exposes only a flat answer navigator.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: student-mock-exam-report-ui is the direct implementation regression. Existing snapshot, practice, mock service and report service tests form the final static F-0098 acceptance matrix and remain untouched unless a same-root test correction is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: This task does not modify organization training, AI selection/scoring, persistence, permission or runtime database behavior; those independent findings remain separate.

resumeAnchor.task: close F-0098 after grouped mock navigation and the final static acceptance matrix pass, then perform the next RC-05 residual disposition
resumeAnchor.condition: do not claim organization training or runtime database acceptance; preserve their independent finding boundaries
